cookies.title: Cookies preferences
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, remember your preferences and understand traffic sources.

whatChanges.title: What this changes for you
whatChanges.item1: Remember a few useful preferences during your visit.
whatChanges.item2: Better understand how visitors discover Socially.
whatChanges.item3: Improve the experience over time without adding UI friction.

ifYouDecline.title: If you decline
ifYouDecline.item3: Some visit information will not be kept.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.item1: No non-essential cookies are set before your consent.
commitment.item2: No ambiguous wording and no hidden choices.
commitment.item3: You will be able to change this decision later.

description.signin: Sign in to continue to Socially.
description.signup: Join Socially to start sharing and connecting.

error.email: Unable to sign you in right now.
error.social: Unable to continue with Google right now.
error.userMsg: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

fields.bio: e.g. Web developer passionate about AI and design.
fields.occupation: e.g. Full-stack web developer, English teacher, student

stepTwo.intro: Choose the topics you want to see in your feed.

stepThree.description: Choose the main reason you are joining Socially.

publish.label: Create content
publish.description: Share your ideas, projects, and posts.

network.label: Grow my network
network.description: Meet useful people and build connections.

read.label: Read content
read.description: Explore posts, learn, and stay informed.

validation.tooSmallString: This field must contain at least {{minimum}} characters.
validation.tooBigString: This field must not exceed {{maximum}} characters.
validation.usernamePattern: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.imageTooLarge: The image must not exceed {{maximum}} MB.

feed.title: Home Feed
feed.description: Discover what's happening in your network.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Surface editorial discovery blocks, accounts and highlights from one place.
discover.placeholder: Discover content is not implemented yet. This placeholder keeps the navigation fully functional while the real page is built.

trending.title: Trending
trending.description: Track the posts and discussions getting the most attention right now.
trending.placeholder: Trending logic is still pending. This route exists now so the new shell can navigate to a stable page.

notifications.title: Notif
notifications.description: Review the latest activity linked to your account and your content.
notifications.placeholder: Notification grouping and read states will arrive later. For now this page is a clean placeholder route.

messages.title: Message
messages.description: Access your future private conversations from the shared authenticated shell.
messages.placeholder: Private messaging is not wired yet. This route is intentionally live so the shell can be validated end to end.

search.title: Search
search.description: Prepare the future search surface for users and posts inside the authenticated shell.
search.placeholder: Search is not implemented yet. This route exists now so the expanded mobile navigation stays fully usable.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Collect beta feedback in a dedicated surface without building the full flow yet.
feedback.placeholder: The complete feedback workflow is outside this ticket. This page exists now as a real navigable placeholder.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Centralize preferences and account management entry points.
settings.placeholder: Settings sections will be implemented incrementally. This placeholder keeps the navigation stable.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Review the public basics of your profile from the authenticated app shell.
profile.placeholder: Add your bio during onboarding or a future profile-edit ticket to replace this placeholder text.
